user_query: I want to create an eye-catching shield logo for my new company. Can you generate a shield design with the company name 'TechXpert'? Additionally, I need some inspiration for a company slogan. Can you provide me with a random flirty line?

TaskList.description: Generate a shield design featuring the company name 'TechXpert'.
Provide a random flirty line as inspiration for the company slogan.
